pin_definitions.description: Programmable current-limit pin. Connect to device GND if external current limit is not used.
Current-sense output. Leave floating if not used. (Version B only)
Enable and disable pin for diagnostic functions. Connect to device GND if not used.
Open-drain diagnostic status output. Leave floating if not used. (Version A only)
Thermal pad. Connect to device GND or leave floating.

logical_pins.name: CL
logical_pins.description: Programmable current-limit pin. Connect to device GND if external current limit is not used.

logical_pins.name: CS
logical_pins.description: Current-sense output. Leave floating if not used.

logical_pins.name: DIAG_EN
logical_pins.description: Enable and disable pin for diagnostic functions. Connect to device GND if not used.

logical_pins.name: ST
logical_pins.description: Open-drain diagnostic status output. Leave floating if not used.

logical_pins.name: Thermal pad
logical_pins.description: Thermal pad. Connect to device GND or leave floating.

14.description: Current-sense output. Leave floating if not used. (also: ST — Open-drain diagnostic status output. Leave floating if not used.)

12.name: DIAG_EN
12.description: Enable and disable pin for diagnostic functions. Connect to device GND if not used.

EP.description: Thermal pad. Connect to device GND or leave floating.
